description: Galileo is an AI agent reliability platform for evaluating, observing, and adding guardrails to LLM applications and autonomous agents. It provides tooling for logging traces, running experiments, managing datasets and prompts, and monitoring production AI behavior.
summary: Galileo exposes a public REST API, a hosted MCP server for IDE/agent clients, and official Python and TypeScript SDK packages that authenticate primarily with a Galileo API key; the REST API also supports Basic auth and short-lived JWT bearer tokens.
